meta.title: Contact | AmberNord
meta.description: Contact AmberNord – questions about our organic sea buckthorn juice, orders, B2B partnerships or personal advice. We respond within 24–48 hours.

og.title: Contact | AmberNord
og.description: We welcome your enquiry – whether about products, orders or B2B partnerships.

header.h1:
We look forward
to hearing from you

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.p1: Do you have questions about our organic sea buckthorn juice, need information about your order, or have another concern? Do not hesitate to reach out. Your satisfaction and uncompromising quality are our top priorities.
intro.p2: Whether you are seeking personal advice or are interested in a B2B partnership – we are happy to assist you openly and transparently.

email.label: Email
email.subtext: We endeavour to respond to all enquiries within 24 to 48 hours.

form.heading: Contact form
form.intro: The easiest and quickest way to reach us is through the form below. Simply leave us your message and we will get back to you promptly.
form.success: Thank you for your message. Our team will be in touch with you shortly.
form.error: An error occurred. Please try again later.

b2b.message:
Dear AmberNord team,

I am interested in the B2B terms for AmberNord products. Please send me further information on the following areas:

• The Master Box (20-bottle edition for clinics & practices)
• Raw essences & industrial organic raw material quantities (ZELT Edition)
• Individual corporate solutions

Kind regards,

masterbox.message:
Dear AmberNord team,

I am interested in The Master Box (20-bottle edition) for my practice / my organisation. Please send me terms, lead times and personalised recommendations.

A few words about me / our use case:


Kind regards,
